PerleShell
— SOL DEVNET
Built on Solana Devnet · Powered by Perle AI

Perle
Quiz App.

An interactive Web3 learning platform that tests your AI knowledge, challenges your human perception, and records your achievements on the Solana blockchain.

🧠
AI Knowledge Quiz
20 timed questions on AI fundamentals, data labeling, RLHF, ethics, and Perle's expert-in-the-loop methodology.
👤 vs 🤖
Human vs AI
Can you tell human-written from AI-generated text? Test the same perception skills Perle's expert annotators use daily.
⛓
On-Chain Records
Pay a 0.001 SOL entry fee, submit scores as Solana memo transactions, and climb the on-chain leaderboard — all on devnet.
How It Works
01
Connect your Solana wallet
Use Phantom, Solflare, or Backpack on devnet. Pay a small 0.001 SOL entry fee to unlock leaderboard eligibility. Or play free — no wallet required.
02
Pick your challenge
Head to the Quiz tab for 20 timed AI knowledge questions, or try Human vs AI to test your text detection instincts across 20 rounds.
03
Earn your Perle tier
Score 0–9 for 🔭 Explorer, 10–15 for 🧭 Navigator, or 16–20 for 🚀 Voyager. Each tier reflects your depth of AI expertise.
04
Submit & compete
Sign a Solana memo transaction to record your score permanently on devnet. Your best score appears on the global leaderboard with a live Explorer link.
Built With
Solana Devnet @solana/web3.js Phantom Wallet Memo Program Vanilla JS Perle AI Content

Perle AI · About & Resources

Perle
Knowledge Base.

Mission

Bringing humanity to artificial intelligence.

Born from AI veterans at Scale, Amazon, Meta, and MIT — Perle empowers teams to bring human wisdom to the heart of their AI through expert-in-the-loop annotation and training.

Vision

Training data you can trust, at the speed you need.

Full visibility, expert-in-the-loop quality, scalable delivery. Perle is your long-term AI data partner — today, tomorrow, and years into the future.

By the Numbers
15K+
Experts
73
Countries
24%
Benchmark Lift
27
Languages
Products & Services
📦
Collect Data
Multi-modal data collection — text, image, audio, video — tailored to your AI model needs.
🏷
Annotate & Enrich
Expert-led annotation for text, image, video, audio — entity recognition, object detection, sentiment, transcription, and custom workflows.
✅
Assure Quality
Verified by experts start to finish. Real-time feedback, automated checks, and expert reviews for complex cases.
📊
Evaluate Models
Fast expert-driven model evaluation — A/B testing, accuracy tracking, bias reviews, safety and compliance checks.
🌍
Engage Experts
Vetted specialists across 73 countries. 100% in-house, NDA by default, SOC-style controls, audit-ready logs.
🧠
WhisperMind
Perle's flagship AI product — advanced multimodal reasoning powered by expert-curated training data.
